courses.name: Gold Course at Wailea
courses.address: 100 Wailea Golf Club Drive, Kihei, HI 96753

courses.name: Emerald Course at Wailea
courses.address: 100 Wailea Golf Club Drive, Kihei, HI 96753
courses.description: More forgiving but still challenging resort course at Wailea

courses.name: Old Blue Course at Wailea
courses.address: 100 Wailea Golf Club Drive, Kihei, HI 96753
courses.description: Classic par-70 course, more relaxed option at Wailea

courses.name: Kauai Lagoons Golf Club
courses.description: Award-winning Jack Nicklaus-designed 18-hole championship course with ocean views. Formerly Kauai Lagoons, rebranded as Hokuala.

courses.name: Kiahuna Golf Club
courses.style: Robert Trent Jones Jr. resort course
courses.description: Robert Trent Jones Jr. design in Poipu with ancient lava walls and tropical gardens. Garden Isle charm.

courses.name: Ocean Course at Hokuala
courses.description: Ocean holes along Nawiliwili Bay. Dramatic finishing hole with ocean on three sides.

courses.name: Poipu Bay Golf Course
courses.style: Robert Trent Jones Jr. oceanfront resort course
courses.description: Oceanfront course in Poipu with challenging holes along the Pacific. Grand Hyatt Kauai location.

courses.name: Princeville Makai Golf Club
courses.style: Robert Trent Jones Jr. with spectacular views
courses.description: World-renowned course on North Shore with breathtaking ocean and mountain views. Recently renovated.

courses.name: Puakea Golf Course
courses.description: Breadth-taking mountain and ocean views. Challenging but playable. Local favorite.

courses.name: Wailua Golf Course
courses.description: Affordable county municipal course along Wailua River. Historic park setting.

courses.name: Prince Course at Princeville
courses.style: Robert Trent Jones Jr. (currently closed for maintenance)
courses.description: Legendary course closed since 2017 for maintenance. Check reopening status.

courses.name: Big Island Country Club
courses.description: Perched on the slopes of Hualalai with cooler climate and panoramic views

courses.name: The Club at Hokuli'a
courses.description: Exclusive Jack Nicklaus signature design with ocean views on Kona coast

courses.name: Hamakua Country Club
courses.style: Affordable public course on Hamakua Coast
courses.description: Affordable golf on the scenic Hamakua Coast, historic plantation town setting

courses.name: Hapuna Golf Course
courses.description: Arnold Palmer design at Mauna Kea Resort with ocean views

courses.name: Hilo Municipal Golf Course
courses.description: Affordable municipal golf on the rainy Hamakua side of island

courses.name: Hualalai Golf Club
courses.description: Jack Nicklaus championship design at Four Seasons Hualalai, hosts Mitsubishi Electric Championship

courses.name: Kohanaiki Golf & Ocean Club
courses.description: Exclusive Rees Jones design on Kona coast with oceanfront holes

courses.name: Kona Country Club
courses.description: Historic oceanfront course in Kailua-Kona with spectacular views

courses.name: Kukio Golf & Beach Club
courses.description: Ultra-exclusive Tom Fazio design on Kona coast

courses.name: Makalei Golf Club
courses.description: Unique upcountry course through native forest at 3,000ft elevation

courses.name: Mauna Kea Golf Course
courses.address: 62-100 Mauna Kea Beach Drive, Kamuela, HI 96743
courses.style: Robert Trent Jones Sr. classic design
courses.description: Historic Robert Trent Jones Sr. design, one of the most celebrated courses in Hawaii

courses.name: Mauna Lani Resort Golf
courses.style: Francis H. I'i Brown championship courses
courses.description: Two championship courses (North and South) at Mauna Lani Resort

courses.name: Nanea Golf Club
courses.description: Ultra-exclusive David McLay Kidd design on Kona coast, very limited membership

courses.name: Naniloa Volcanoes Golf Club
courses.description: Resort course in Hilo near Banyan Drive waterfront

courses.name: Sea Mountain Golf Course
courses.description: Resort course in the Ka'u District, south part of Big Island

courses.name: Volcano Golf & Country Club
courses.description: Hawaii's highest course at 4,200ft elevation, near Kilauea Volcano. Adds 10-25 yards to every shot.

courses.name: Waikoloa Beach Course
courses.style: Robert Trent Jones Jr. resort course
courses.description: Robert Trent Jones Jr. design with ancient lava flows and ocean views

courses.name: Waikoloa Kings' Course
courses.description: Tom Weiskopf/Jay Morrish design with wide fairways and ocean views

courses.name: Waikoloa Village Golf Club
courses.description: Affordable public golf in Waikoloa Village with mountain and ocean views

courses.name: Manele Golf Course
courses.address: 1 Manele Bay Road, Lanai City, HI 96763
courses.description: Jack Nicklaus signature design at Four Seasons Lanai. Cliffside holes with sweeping Pacific views. One of Hawaii's most spectacular courses.

courses.name: The Challenge at Manele
courses.address: 1 Manele Bay Road, Lanai City, HI 96763
courses.description: Tournament routing at Manele for special events and challenges. Requires resort stay.

courses.name: Cavendish Golf Course
courses.description: Free public 9-hole course in Lanai City center. No fees, no tee times. Bring own clubs (no rentals).

courses.name: Ironwood Hills Golf Club
courses.description: Only 9-holes on Molokai Island. Elevated green with mountain and ocean views. Local volunteer maintained. Friendly small-town atmosphere.
